Sports Activities on Campus

The University’s Healthy Living Centre offers students the opportunity to lead a university life intertwined with sport. The centre’s pitches and studios provide facilities for indoor football, basketball, volleyball, handball, tennis, table tennis, dance, yoga and Pilates. All students at Doğuş University can make use of these sports facilities free of charge.
